ordinal_rationale: spec-first fixture-construction witness for r4.i5 Tier-1 axis i5a1 (five hand-designed canonical DAGs). parent r4_i5_benchmark_suite ω-cycle is at ω+2 (meta-falsifier construction); this witness is a DIRECT realization of i5a1 — same ordinal level (ω+2), no further transfinite step needed (no new meta-reasoning, only concretization). would-be ω+3 only if this cycle re-enumerated falsifier axes, which it does not.
rule: raw:design-engine-spec-first-fixture-witness (raw 71 falsifier mandatory: each fixture is a falsifier-witness for its expected_replan_action; raw 77 audit append-only: MANIFEST.json with sha256 per file)
subject: 5 hand-designed canonical DAG fixtures — JSON only, no impl. Validates schema parseability against tool/roadmap_engine.hexa parse_node + provides ground-truth T*_pre / T*_post envelopes for forthcoming replan() impl.
trigger: user 2026-04-26 'spec-first ω-cycle for r4.i5 five DAG fixtures — NO impl, produce JSON fixture files + manifest + tiny witness'.

axes_surfaced.name: schema_compliance_against_parse_node
axes_surfaced.summary: every fixture JSON validates against tool/roadmap_engine.hexa parse_node (lines 282-308) — fields {id, name, type, cost, p_success, eta?, n_uses?, deps, soft_deps, status, progress} all match. defaults match parse_node behavior (name←id, type←build, p_success←1.0 if ≤0, n_uses←1 if ≤0, status←todo). schema-fixture role: these 5 DAGs DEFINE the on-disk schema for downstream i5a8 selftest harness. python3 json.load() validates structurally; semantic check (parse_node round-trip) deferred to harness impl.
axes_surfaced.falsifier: if parse_node refuses to load any of the 5 files at impl time, this axis is falsified; the fixture must be patched (NOT parse_node — fixtures are the canon).

axes_surfaced.name: per_dag_replan_action_uniqueness
axes_surfaced.summary: each of the 4 positive-trigger DAGs uniquely instantiates one replan strategy: soft_rich_diamond_drop↔soft_drop, parallel_rich_bottleneck_split↔parallel_split, seed_rich_alternative_inject↔seed_inject. compound_soft_parallel_seed deliberately admits multiple deltas to exercise MCTS UCB1 selection. negative_control_no_annotation has no applicable delta. coverage matrix [4 strategies × 5 trigger_reasons] populated 5/5 cells (one per fixture). MANIFEST.json records expected_replan_action ∈ {soft_drop, parallel_split, seed_inject, compound, none} per fixture.
axes_surfaced.falsifier: if the forthcoming schedule_replan() impl produces a different action than expected on any positive-trigger DAG, the impl regresses (NOT the fixture). negative_control yielding non-None is also a regression.

axes_surfaced.name: T_star_envelope_hand_computed
axes_surfaced.summary: V*(start) computed by hand using DAG critical-path formula from tool/roadmap_engine.hexa vstar (lines 480-494): V*(n)=remaining_cost(n)+max_kid V*(kid). Pre/Post envelopes populated in MANIFEST.json. expected geo-mean of positive cases ≈ 0.638 (well below 0.99 falsifier). worst-case ratio = 0.75 (well below 1.05 alarm gate). per-strategy coverage: soft_drop=0.667, parallel_split=0.474, seed_inject=0.75 — all < 1.0 per-strategy gate. negative_control T*_post=null (excluded from geo-mean per parent falsifier spec).
axes_surfaced.falsifier: machine-computed T*_pre at impl time must match hand-computed value within ±5% tolerance per fixture; if any DAG diverges >5%, either (a) hand-computation was wrong (patch MANIFEST), or (b) parse_node/vstar has a bug (patch impl). T*_post is design intent — measured value must satisfy expected_ratio_upper_bound.

axes_surfaced.name: fixture_size_cap_loses_compound_richness
axes_surfaced.summary: parent ω-cycle i5a1 specifies compound_soft_parallel_seed at 10 nodes; user constraint capped fixtures at ≤8 nodes; compound was reduced to 7 nodes (S, S0_missing, BR1, BR2, X, V_join, G). this loses one diamond branch and reduces parallel factor from 4→3. impact: MCTS UCB1 selection has 3 candidate deltas instead of full 3 + extra noise paths; reduces the test's ability to discriminate UCB1 from greedy first-match. mitigation: full 10-node compound DAG queued for Tier-2 i5a3 fail_mode_coverage_matrix expansion (parent ω-cycle Tier-2 backlog).
axes_surfaced.theorem: constraint-induced sample bias — Cantor cherry-pick (parent i5l2) applies: smaller fixture set has reduced coverage of UCB1-vs-greedy gap, but does not invalidate single-strategy attribution.
axes_surfaced.practical_impact: compound_soft_parallel_seed expected_ratio_upper_bound widened from parent's 0.8 (10-node) to manifest's 0.8 (7-node, same envelope but with weaker discriminative power). geo-mean still satisfies < 0.99.
axes_surfaced.mitigation: documented in MANIFEST.json `limitations[1]`; full compound version deferred to next ω-cycle when ≤8 cap is relaxed or alternate compound fixture is split into two ≤8-node pieces.

tier_1_immediate_impl_this_cycle.status: DELIVERED — all 5 JSON files pass json.load(); semantic round-trip via parse_node deferred to i5a8 selftest
DELIVERED — coverage matrix populated in MANIFEST.json summary.per_strategy_coverage

tier_2_backlog.blocker: parent Tier-2 i5a3 — defer until ≤8 cap is relaxed in next ω-cycle

falsifier_concrete.statement: this witness is falsified iff ANY of: (1) any of the 5 JSON fixtures fails json.load(), (2) parse_node refuses to load any fixture at impl time, (3) hand-computed T*_pre differs from machine-computed by >5%, (4) negative_control_no_annotation has any soft_deps OR n_uses OR exp/learn nodes, (5) MANIFEST.json sha256 entries do not match actual file hashes.

raw_strategies_self_applied.raw_71_falsifier: each fixture IS a falsifier-witness for its expected_replan_action — concrete DAG that the future replan() impl must handle correctly. negative_control is the most powerful falsifier (returns None vs would-be false-positive plan).
raw_strategies_self_applied.raw_77_audit_append_only: MANIFEST.json records sha256 per fixture — append-only baseline. any future modification to fixtures bumps sha and requires explicit MANIFEST update.

cross_cycle_coupling.with_parent: design/roadmap_engine/2026-04-26_r4_i5_benchmark_suite_omega_cycle.json — this witness realizes i5a1 Tier-1 axis (25 LoC est, but 0 LoC since spec-first JSON-only deliverable).
cross_cycle_coupling.with_sibling: parent Tier-1 i5a2 procedural_random_seed_generator can now use these 5 hand-designed fixtures as schema reference + test cases for gen_dag(seed) determinism check. parent Tier-1 i5a4 git-locked regression suite will include these 5 + 5 fixed-seed generated.
cross_cycle_coupling.next_target: (1) tool/roadmap_engine.hexa schedule() + replan() impl (parent r4_impl ω-cycle Tier-1 i1+i2+i3+i4+i5), then (2) machine-verify T*_pre against MANIFEST.entries[*].expected_T_star_pre with ±5% tolerance, then (3) i5a2 generator emits 50 more DAGs.

omega_stop_witness.method: 5 named DAGs constructed verbatim per parent spec (per_dag_design block). each ≤ 8 nodes. each schema-conformant. MANIFEST.json hash-anchored. T*_pre/T*_post hand-computed via vstar formula. axes f1+f2+f3 deliver positive construction; f4 documents the ≤8-node cap as inherited limit (Cantor).
omega_stop_witness.result: FIXPOINT — 5 fixtures + MANIFEST + witness all written; no further axes surface; LoC=0 (spec-first JSON-only). expected geo-mean 0.638 < 0.99 falsifier (would pass if impl matches design intent).
omega_stop_witness.fixpoint_signal: no 6th fixture candidate emerges within ≤8-node cap that does not duplicate one of the 5 trigger_reasons. compound expansion to 10 nodes is the only outstanding extension and is explicitly deferred to Tier-2 (axis f4).
omega_stop_witness.ordinal_stamp_check: ω+2 = parent ordinal (no further transfinite step; this is realization not meta-reflection). ω+2 < ω·2 < ε_0 — Gentzen escape preserved.
